arts.ttl: Man United OPEN talks over beating Liverpool to world class forward for Ruben Amorim’s first signing
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly had first contacts over the potential transfer of Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush. The Egypt international looks like one of the most in-form attacking players in Europe at the moment, scoring 15 goals in 18 games in all competitions so far this season.
